VILLAGE OF FISHKILL POLICE DEPARTMENT RECOGNIZED FOR EXCELLENCE IN POLICY MANAGEMENT AND TRAINING
Water and Sewer Rates Effective April 15 2025
The Village of Fishkill’s 2025 MS4 Annual Report is available for review on this website, as is the Fishkill’s Stormwater Management Program Plan for review.  Anyone interested in reviewing the Stormwater Management Program Plan, providing input, or participating in its implementation, should contact the Village Clerk to make arrangements to come to Village Hall to review this information.  Any questions or comments relative to the 2025 Annual Report or SWMP Plan must be submitted in writing to Village of Fishkill, 1095 Main Street, Fishkill, NY  12524 by Friday, March 28, 2025
Water and Sewer Rates Effective April 15 2025
